ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wdt_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WDT configuration */,
  "wdp3" INTEGER /* Configuration bit WDP3 */,
  "wdp2" INTEGER /* Configuration bit WDP2 */,
  "wdp1" INTEGER /* Configuration bit WDP1 */,
  "wdp0" INTEGER /* Configuration bit WDP0 */,
  "oscillator_cycles" INTEGER /* Number of WDT oscillator cycles */,
  "typical_timeout_5v" TEXT /* Typical timeout at 5.0V voltage */,
  "min_timeout_ms" INTEGER /* Minimum timeout duration in milliseconds */,
  "max_timeout_ms" INTEGER /* Maximum timeout duration in milliseconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the configuration for documentation purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voltage_levels" (
  "voltage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voltage level */,
  "voltage_value" REAL /* Voltage level (e.g., 5.0V) */,
  "timeout_adjustment_factor" REAL /* Factor by which the timeout is adjusted for this voltage level */,
  "min_voltage_value" REAL /* Minimum voltage level for the range */,
  "max_voltage_value" REAL /* Maximum voltage level for the range */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the voltage level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the voltage level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voltage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "embedded_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each embedded system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the embedded system */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the system is used */,
  "mcu_model" TEXT /* Model of the MCU used in the system */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer of the embedded system */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was produced */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number of the embedded system */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the system was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the system record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the WDT configuration */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the embedded system */,
  "voltage_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voltage level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was assigned to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the configuration assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id", "system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_system_configurations_voltage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voltage_id") REFERENCES voltage_levels ("voltage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the configuration */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the WDT configuration being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES wdt_configurations ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance data entry */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the embedded system */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the WDT configuration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the performance tracking period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the performance tracking period */,
  "reliability_score" REAL /* Reliability score of the WDT configuration */,
  "reset_count" INTEGER /* Number of system resets during the tracking period */,
  "average_response_time_ms" REAL /* Average response time of the system during the tracking period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the performance data was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the performance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES embedded_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_data_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES wdt_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics report */,
  "system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the embedded system */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* ID of the WDT configuration */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., monthly, quarterly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("system_id") REFERENCES embedded_systems ("system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES wdt_configurations ("config_id")
)
